overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic urban waterfront district in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), beginning in a plaza with modern architecture, proceeding through covered walkways and neon-lit interiors, and ending in an open palm-lined promenade facing the setting sun. The scene features a mix of natural golden hour lighting and vibrant artificial neon.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban plaza with monumental staircase

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the plaza toward the waterfront, passing pedestrians and concrete benches

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red jacket walking up the stairs

entered.detail: large futuristic building with wide stone staircase and glass facade
illuminated advertisement screen displaying colorful graphics
tall palm trees lining the left side of the plaza

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a sunlit futuristic plaza with a large modern building featuring a grand staircase on the right. Palm trees line the left side while pedestrians walk through the space. The camera moves forward across the paved tiles toward a water feature in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront plaza with reflecting pool facing sunset

events.description: approaching waterfront reflecting pool with direct view of setting sun

agents.ego_description: walking along the edge of the reflecting pool toward the sunset, with water reflecting the golden light

entered.detail: rectangular water feature reflecting the sunset and surrounding buildings
distant futuristic skyscrapers silhouetted against the sunset

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to an open waterfront area with a reflecting pool on the left that mirrors the golden sunset. The camera moves forward with the sun directly ahead, creating long shadows. The distant city skyline becomes visible across the water while the large building from the previous segment falls behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban pedestrian street under elevated highway structure

events.description: entering deep shadow cast by elevated highway overpass
approaching dark tunnel entrance beneath the building complex

agents.ego_description: walking along the street under the overpass, moving from sunlight into shadow

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in orange jacket walking toward camera

entered.detail: massive concrete elevated highway casting deep shadows
large structural support columns for the overpass
cars parked along the left side of the street

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into the shadow of a massive elevated highway structure, transitioning from bright sunlight to dimmer mixed lighting. The environment becomes more urban and enclosed with concrete pillars lining the right side. The camera approaches a dark tunnel entrance while pedestrians walk in opposing directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit transit lobby with AVANTE signage

events.description: entering interior space with vibrant pink and yellow neon ceiling
exiting lobby to covered waterfront walkway with view of sunset

agents.ego_description: ascending stairs into the neon-lit lobby, then exiting to the covered walkway along the water

entered.detail: vibrant pink and yellow illuminated ceiling panels in the lobby
illuminated signage reading 'AVANTE' on the lobby wall
futuristic vending machines with glowing screens
metal railing along the covered waterfront walkway

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a dark interior space suddenly illuminated by a vibrant neon ceiling in pink and yellow hues, with an 'AVANTE' sign visible. After briefly passing through this lobby and ascending stairs, the camera exits to a covered walkway alongside the waterfront, with the sunset visible ahead and glass buildings on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with palm trees facing sunset

events.description: emerging from covered walkway into open palm-lined plaza
descending stairs to lower terrace level of the promenade

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza toward the setting sun, descending stairs to a lower level with expansive waterfront views

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead on the path

entered.detail: modern street lamps lining the promenade

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a vast open plaza lined with palm trees facing the setting sun. The camera descends stairs to a lower terrace level with expansive views of the waterfront and distant city skyline. The warm golden light creates long shadows across the tiled ground as the camera moves toward the sunset, leaving the built environment behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunlit futuristic plaza through a dense urban interior and back out into a vast, open waterfront at sunset. It begins by gliding across paved tiles past a grand staircase and palm trees, moving toward a reflecting pool that mirrors the golden light of the descending sun. As the camera advances, the bright open air shifts into the heavy shadow of a massive elevated highway, where concrete pillars and a dark tunnel entrance create a more enclosed, urban atmosphere. The scene then transitions abruptly into a dark interior illuminated by vibrant pink and yellow neon ceilings and an AVANTE sign, before ascending stairs to a covered walkway flanked by glass buildings. Finally, the camera emerges from the architecture into a wide plaza lined with palm trees, descending to a lower terrace that opens toward an expansive view of the city skyline and the glowing horizon.
